decisions.briefing: Markets posted a quiet neutral session to close out June — NASDAQ +0.7%, S&P 500 +0.3% — well below the +2% threshold that justifies deploying cash on a conviction buy. We have $577 and four open slots, but strategy memory is explicit: two neutral hold days in a row is correct behavior, not a failure. All six positions are held; the three score-100 candidates (KTOS, ONDS, RDW) each carry full multi-signal confirmation and are first in line when a genuine risk-on day arrives.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted modestly higher on the final trading day of June as quarter-end portfolio rebalancing flows provided a mild tailwind without any major catalysts to drive conviction. Tech and growth names edged up, lifting the NASDAQ 0.7%, while the broader S&P 500 added 0.3% in lighter volume typical of a session bookending a holiday-shortened period. Markets remained in a holding pattern as investors awaited upcoming jobs data that could clarify the Federal Reserve's trajectory on interest rates.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股在六月最後一個交易日小幅收漲，季末投資組合再平衡的資金流動提供了溫和支撐，但缺乏重大催化劑驅動市場形成明確方向。科技及成長股略有上升，帶動納斯達克指數上漲0.7%，標普500指數則上揚0.3%，成交量因臨近假期而偏淡。市場整體處於觀望狀態，投資者靜候即將公布的就業數據，以研判聯儲局下一步利率政策走向。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Capital preservation is the discipline of protecting your portfolio value by avoiding unnecessary risk when conditions don't favor a trade. On a neutral day like today, deploying cash into new positions just to feel busy would mean accepting suboptimal entry points and a weak risk/reward ratio. Holding dry powder and waiting for a high-conviction setup is itself an active, profitable decision — the cash is doing its job by staying available for better opportunities.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 資本保全（Capital Preservation）是一種在市場條件不利時避免不必要風險、主動保護投資組合價值的紀律。在今天這種中性行情下，為了「做點什麼」而貿然買入新倉，只會在入市時機不佳的情況下接受偏低的風險回報比。保留現金、靜候高確信度入市機會，本身就是一個積極且正確的決策——閒置的現金正在發揮其應有的作用，等待更好的時機出現。
